title: Loading Effect Test Page
description: Compare the current sweep with several perimeter-light variants at the same size, so it is easier to choose for generation, processing, and preview placeholders.

currentSweep.title: Current Light Sweep
currentSweep.summary: A broad highlight crosses the content area. It is clear, but it competes with the preview.

singleOrbit.title: Single Perimeter Flow
singleOrbit.summary: One light travels around the frame, keeping the center stable while still feeling active.

dualOrbit.title: Dual Perimeter Flow
dualOrbit.summary: Two highlights orbit at once, creating a stronger active-processing signal.

cornerFlow.title: Corner Relay Flow
cornerFlow.summary: The light focuses on corners and short edge segments, keeping movement clear without a full neon frame.

softPulse.title: Soft Breathing Edge
softPulse.summary: A restrained slow perimeter flow with a light pulse, better for states that may stay visible.

dashedTrack.title: Dashed Track Flow
dashedTrack.summary: A moving dashed track feels more technical and progress-oriented.
